chain.thought: Explanation: The earliest date in the Canadian airdate column is July 11, 2013, listed for the first entry.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table’s earliest Canadian airdate appears in row 1, where episodes 1–2 (“Summertime”) premiered together on July 11, 2013. Because the season premiere is a two-part episode sharing the same date, there is no single, distinct “first” Canadian airdate—both parts are concurrent. In such cases, representing the “first” as null appropriately reflects the absence of a unique, singular first date. All subsequent entries (beginning July 18, 2013 and onward) occur later, confirming that there is no earlier unique Canadian airdate to select.
